channel_news.summary: Last week, retail giants including Home Depot, Walmart, Target, TJX and Urban Outfitters, Inc. reported their quarterly earnings. And there were a surprising number of bright spots considering the inflationary pressure both retailers and consumers have faced over the past year.

channel_news.title: Hits and misses from Q1 earnings season
channel_news.summary: First quarter earnings results reveal some strong growth in the retail sector along with concerns from macroeconomic conditions like high fuel prices and budget-conscious shoppers.

channel_news.title: Walmart warns it may have to raise prices due to fuel costs
channel_news.summary: Higher fuel prices due to the war with Iran are putting pressure on Walmart's customers and supply chain, and could lead to higher prices on the shelf.

channel_news.title: Marketplace Briefing: What Shein’s acquisition of Everlane could mean for its marketplace ambitions
channel_news.summary: Shein’s purported acquisition of Everlane isn’t its first attempt to boost its brand credibility. In recent years, it struck a partnership with Forever 21, acquired the U.K. brand Missguided and launched a third-party marketplace. But it's still unclear how all of these efforts will live together.

channel_news.title: The TikTok effect: How viral trends are changing visual merchandising
channel_news.summary: The average viral trend lasts just five to 10 days before attention shifts. And with 42% of Gen Z consumers in the U.S. discovering new products on TikTok, the need for speed has never been more critical.
